urdu transliteration text: AKBAR KO PUKAARAA KABHI SARWAR KO PUKAARAA
english translation text: She cried out to AKBAR and to Hussain

urdu transliteration text:
KEHTI THI MADAD KIJI-E BAABAA MERE BAABAA
Help me dear father - she pleaded

BAAQI NA RAHAA ZAINABE DILGIR KAA PARDAA
Alas, the broken hearted Zainab's veil was not spared
HAMSHIR KAA PARDAA MERI DILGIR KA PARDAA
english translation text: The veil of my sister, the veil of the heartbroken
